Accolade Collection Book

Contents

  • 1 Collection Book List
    • 1.1 Fortnite OG
    • 1.2 Fortnite: Reload
    • 1.3 Disabled or Unreleased Accolades
  • 2 History
  • 3 Trivia
  • 4 References

Accolade Collection Book

  • REMIX
  • C5S4
  • C5S3

Type

Collection System

Details

Introduced

Update v30.00

Overview

This article is about the Collection Book introduced in Chapter 5: Season 3. For the Emote, see Accolades. For the Creative Device, see Accolades (Device).


The Accolade Collection Book is a feature in Fortnite: Battle Royale, first introduced in Chapter 5: Season 3, that details all Accolades that can be acquired throughout the Season.

The Accolade Collection Book is divided into several category pages, each containing related accolades. It also features a button at the top-left of the interface to clear all unseen badges and a counter showing how many accolades the player has acquired out of the total. When viewing a specific accolade, details such as its position on the page, name, description, XP granted upon first acquisition, times acquired during the season, and its icon are shown.

Collection Book List

Collection Book List[]

  • C6MS2
  • C6S4
  • C6S3
  • C6MS1
  • C6S2
  • C6S1
  • REMIX
  • C5S4
  • C5S3

History

History[]

  • C5S3
  • C5S4
  • REMIX
  • C6S1
  • C6S2

Update v30.00[]

  • Introduced the Accolade Collection Book with 174 accolades.
  • 30th May 2024: Disabled the Lucky Llama Accolade due to it being impossible to obtain currently, lowering the total down to 173.
    • It required the player to eliminate a Supply Llama, which is not currently available in Chapter 5: Season 3.

Update v30.20[]

  • Enabled the Sniper Specialist, Sniper Expert, and Sniper Master accolades, bringing the total up to 176.

Update v31.00[]

  • Updated the Accolade Collection Book for Chapter 5: Season 4. It now contains a total of 166 accolades.
    • Disabled the Duelist, Gearhead, Sniper Specialist, Sniper Expert, Sniper Master, Vault Breaker, Wasteland Ruler, Wasteland Warrior, Wasteland Berserker, Wasteland Hunter, Wasteland Assassin, Wasteland Survivor, Demolition Derby, Hot Rod, Adrenaline Junkie, Sugar Bomb, Chemical Strike, and Gauntlet Barrage accolades.
    • Updated the icons for the Single Digit, Double Digits, Elimination Collector, Elimination Hoarder, Elimination Escapade, Distance Shot, Ludicrous Shot, and Impossible Shot accolades.
      • The icon for the Vault Breaker accolade was also updated, despite the accolade being unused currently.
    • Moved the Road Rage and Road Trip accolades from Seasonal to Special.
  • August 16th 2024: Disabled the Doctor's Orders accolade, lowering the total down to 165.
    • The Triage Trooper NPC was also disabled at the same time, making the accolade impossible to obtain.
  • August 21st 2024: Disabled the Bow Specialist, Bow Expert, and Bow Master accolades due to them being impossible to obtain currently, lowering the total down to 162.
    • They were remnants from the previous season, when Crossbows were still available.

Update v31.10[]

  • Enabled the Doctor's Orders accolade along with the reintroduction of the Triage Trooper NPC, bringing the total up to 163.
  • September 9th 2024: Disabled the Change of Heart accolade due to it being impossible to obtain currently, lowering the total down to 162.
    • It required the player to give a second chance to a knocked-down Doom Henchmen, which is no longer possible due to the mechanic being disabled at the start of Chapter 5: Season 4.

Update v31.20[]

  • Added and enabled the Birthday Celebration accolade, bringing the total up to 163.
  • October 1st 2024: Disabled the Birthday Celebration accolade, lowering the total down to 162.

Update v31.40[]

  • Added and enabled the Saw That Coming, Gourd Riddance, The Witching Hour, and Thanks, I hate it accolades for the Fortnitemares 2024 Event, bringing the total up to 166.

Update v32.00[]

  • Updated the Accolade Collection Book for Chapter 2 Remix. It now contains a total of 133 accolades.
    • Enabled the Marksman Specialist, Marksman Expert, Marksman Master and Vault Breaker accolades.
    • Disabled the Adventure Buddies, Fast Talker, Shopping Spree, First Modification, Shady Help Wanted, Marksman Specialist, Marksman Expert, Marksman Master, Hired Gun, Unfollowed, Helping Hand, Big Spender, High Roller, Compulsive Shoulder, Gold Rush, Gilded Glory, Treasure Trove, Medallion Magnet, Monumental Monarch, Shadow Organization, Weapon Smuggler, Flying Fortune, Head on a Swivel, Collateral Damage, Supplies Inbound, Doctor's Orders and Thank the Conductor accolades.
    • Changed the position of some accolades within the Survival and Special category pages.
    • Removed the Seasonal category page.

Update v32.10[]

  • Disabled the Who's the Boss? accolade, lowering the total down to 132.
    • During Chapter 2 Remix, defeating a Boss does not eliminate them, meaning the accolade could only be obtained by eliminating the boss while they were another player's follower.

Update v33.00[]

  • Updated the Accolade Collection Book for Chapter 6: Season 1. It now contains a total of 171 accolades.
    • Re-added the Seasonal category page.
    • Enabled the Adventure Buddies, Fast Talker, Shopping Spree, First Modification, Shady Help Wanted Accolades, Big Spender, High Roller, Compulsive Shopper, Gold Rush, Gilded Glory, Treasure Trove, Thank The Conductor, Shadow Organization, Flying Fortune, Helping Hand, Head on a Swivel, Collateral Damage, Supplies Inbound, and Doctor's Orders accolades.
      • Moved the Helping Hand, Head on a Swivel, Collateral Damage, Supplies Inbound, and Doctor's Orders Accolades to the new Social Category page.
    • Disabled the Sniper Specialist, Sniper Expert, Sniper Master, And The Kitchen Sink, Distance Shot, Warm Respite, Feed Finder, and Vault Breaker accolades.
    • Moved the Carrying, Relentless, Celebrated Crawler, and Friends Til The End Accolades to the new Social Category page.
    • Added the Reboot Revenge, The Royal Party, Show Time, No One Left Behind, Stay Down, Eye In The Sky, Mending Machine, Shield Supervisor, Reboot Van Rebooting..., Support Class, Hype Squad, Hand Me Downs, Spare Change, You Shouldn't Have, Thank You Kindly, Cyclone Slashing, Demonic Rage, Demonic Laughter, Fiend Slayer, Demon Hunter, Waterbound Restoration, Windbound Transportation, Earthbound Belch, Boonderful Bounty, and Powerful Parkour accolades.
      • Also adde
    • The First Modification and Flying Fortune accolades are unobtainable as Weapon Mods and Supply Drones are currently vaulted.
  • Changed the font of the text displaying the number of accolades acquired out of the total.
  • December 5th, 2024: Disabled the No One Left Behind accolade, lowering the total down to 170.

Update v33.20[]

  • January 14th 2024: The Thank You Kindly accolade is now granted instantly upon thanking the Bus Driver, instead of when the Bus phase ends.

Update v34.00[]

  • Updated the Accolade Collection Book for Chapter 6: Season 1. It now contains a total of 100 accolades.
  • Unknown: Disabled the Collateral Damage accolade.
  • Unknown: Disabled the Better Late Than Nover accolade.

Update v34.10[]

  • Added the Bore-ing Transportation accolade

Trivia

Trivia[]

  • Accolades as a concept were first introduced in Chapter 2: Season 1.
  • The Marksman Specialist, Marksman Expert, and Marksman Master accolades currently hold the record as the longest unobtainable accolades in the Accolade Collection Book. They remained enabled but impossible to obtain for 78 consecutive days, covering the entire duration of Chapter 5: Season 4.
  • In Chapter 5: Season 2, many new accolades were added, and some existing ones were updated. Some information about a possible collection book for them was also found within the game's files.[1] Then, a season later, the Accolade Collection Book was introduced.
  • Some Accolades' descriptions contain small orthographic errors, such as those from:
    • Feed Finder, which misspells "forageables" as "foragables".
    • Powerful Parkour, which misspells "Roll Landings" as "Roll Landing".
References
